content.text: Good — the history server pod is Pending and both SparkPi jobs are running. Now I'll apply all three fixes simultaneously.

input.description: Fix Team A RoleBinding subject namespace
Fix History Server log directory env var

content.text: All three patches applied. Now I'll poll until the history server is Running and both SparkPi jobs complete.

input.command:
echo "=== Waiting for History Server pod to be Running ===" && \
for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  STATUS=$(kubectl get pods -n spark-history -l app=spark-history-server --no-headers 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $3}')
  echo "[$i] History Server pod status: $STATUS"
  if [ "$STATUS" = "Running" ]; then
    echo "History Server is Running!"
    break
  fi
  sleep 5
done
input.description: Poll History Server pod until Running

input.command:
echo "=== Waiting for SparkPi jobs to complete ===" && \
for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  JOB_A=$(kubectl get job spark-pi-team-a -n spark-team-a --no-headers 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}')
  JOB_B=$(kubectl get job spark-pi-team-b -n spark-team-b --no-headers 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}')
  echo "[$i] team-a: $JOB_A | team-b: $JOB_B"
  if [ "$JOB_A" = "1/1" ] && [ "$JOB_B" = "1/1" ]; then
    echo "Both SparkPi jobs completed!"
    break
  fi
  sleep 5
done
input.description: Poll SparkPi jobs until both complete
